close_reason: TypeScript deps would require npm integration. The js_library rules need worker setup - documented limitations.
description:
Create examples/typescript/hello-deps/ with an npm package dependency.

Files needed:
- examples/typescript/hello-deps/main.ts - uses npm package (e.g., lodash, chalk)
- examples/typescript/hello-deps/BUCK - target with deps
- examples/typescript/hello-deps/package.json

Requires:
- TypeScript deps cell with npm packages
- Type definitions (@types/*)

Should work with both native ts-node/node and buck2 run.
title: TypeScript: hello with npm package (deps example)
